title: PorcChrysus Eating Sound Effect
body:
1. this resourcepack replaces vanilla eating sound effect with porcchrysus eating sound effect
2. this is useful for all people in the world who want to make their minecraft eating sound effect worse
3. based on <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TERpQWpddco" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
